name: Graphics Pipeline Library · Issue #2798 · doitsujin/dxvk - GitHub
snippet: The Vulkan Graphics Pipeline Library, compiling those DirectX shader "lego pieces" during loading screens, for quick fast-linking later.

name: ELI5 why OpenGL and Vulkan need to compile their shaders but
snippet: DXVK shader compilation stuttering happens on when using DXVK because DXVK doesn't know what shaders will be needed until they're called for.

name: (DX9) DXVK's Shader Compilation seems broken in RDNA 4 GPUs
snippet: Vulkan driver in Adrenalin 26.3.1 still hasn't been fixed so it still doesn't work properly with dxvk when LLPC compiler is used.

name: Developer guidelines · doitsujin/dxvk Wiki - GitHub
snippet: DXVK will start creating Vulkan pipeline libraries or complete Vulkan pipelines in the background. Compiling shaders "on demand", D3D11 drivers.
